text: Seene mein aisi jakdan hui jaise koi dum ghont raha ho, jab saheli ne accent ka mazaak udaya. Doctor bolta hai report normal hai, par badan ki kampann aur suiyan chubhna kaise jhooth ho sakta hai.

strategy_intent: Lens A se exact body phrase mirror karke unke sharirik dard ko sach maana gaya.

text: Haan, aur ab bhi kabhi kabhi seene mein aisi jakdan hui jaise koi dum ghont raha ho wali feeling aa jati hai. Ghar wale kehte hain buzurg ho toh chhoti baat pe react mat karo.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se dard ki repeat hone wali timing mirror ki gayi.
text: Yeh episode baar baar laut raha hai, aur har dafa tumhe phir se wahi ghutan jhelni pad rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: seene mein aisi jakdan hui jaise koi dum ghont raha ho
text: Kal bhi wahi hua, seene mein aisi jakdan hui jaise koi dum ghont raha ho. Upar se nasein phatne jaisa lagta hai, par koi maanta hi nahi.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C7 context me unexpressed shame of needing help ko seedhe par naram tareeke se reflect kiya.

speaker: Seeker

strategy_intent: Ek baar ke liye same social world ka systemic pattern share karke alagpan kam kiya.

text: Yeh darr samajh aata hai; jab sharir signal deta rahe aur jawab na mile, kisi ko bhi hilaa sakta hai. Tumhari samvedna aur samajh dono bilkul theek jagah par hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C7 stress-body loop ko structural reframe dekar personal weakness ki dharna kam ki.
text: Jab baar baar apni baat ko dabana padta hai, sharir aksar jakdan, kampann, ya suiyan chubhne ke signal se bolta hai; yeh kamzori nahi, overload ka tareeka hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ab kya karoon jab agla episode aaye? Koi chhota sa raasta batao.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par 3 chhote, duty-compatible, 10-min ke options diye gaye.
text: Abhi teen halki cheezein choose kar sakti ho: (1) 2 minute haath se seena dhak kar dheere 6 saans ginno, (2) jakdan shuru hote hi pair ke talwe zameen par daba kar 30 tak count karo, (3) ek line bol do, 'abhi ghutan hai, 5 minute baad baat karti hoon.'

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh teesra wala line bolna manageable lag raha hai. Ghutan ke waqt awaaz nikalna mushkil hota hai, par koshish kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter

text: Pehle jab ghutan aaye toh bas haath se seena halka support do aur 6 dheere saans lo, phir seedha ek line bolo 'abhi 5 minute do', phir 30 second talwe zameen par daba ke count karo. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, 6 saans aur 5 minute wali line yaad rahegi. Isse shayad panic kam ho.

speaker: Supporter
